evidence: "The action scenes are some of the best ever done"
"Very funny. Not your standard Marvel flick."
"A funny movie. James Brolin was very good."
"Very entertaining movie. Lots of action, lots of killing, lots of blood."
"The action scenes are some of the best ever done."
"If blood and killing bother you then skip it."
"The movie looks really great on blu-ray and there is some added footage which answers a couple of questions."
"The additional footage makes the story easier to follow."
"If you loved the TV show you will love the movie too."
"Watching Selma Hayek dance with the clarity of blu-ray is a wonderful thing."
"The movies are much clearer in blu-ray and are still great even with the additional crap Lucas inserted."
"Great movie. One of the rare times the sequel is as good as the original."
"If you grew up watching this, like I did, it will surely bring back some good memories."

summary: The user has a strong preference for action and comedy genres, enjoying fast-paced narratives with a focus on visual spectacle. They appreciate high production quality but show low brand loyalty, indicating a more general enjoyment of entertaining films rather than specific creators or franchises.
